clem_player.response:
It seems like I've made a typo in my previous response. Here's the corrected version:

> open wardrobe

This action will allow you to access the interior of the wardrobe, enabling you to place items inside it.

Remember, your current goal is to:
- Put the secti in the imped
- Place the inet on the table
- Hang the broom on the rably.

Once you've completed these tasks, you can end the game by typing "> done".
